title: Skills Overview Page Rendering
activity_flow: CALL buildSubPageData(rootDir) → data { skillsByCategory, skills, tutorials, rules, knownSkillIds }
SETUP: compute outDirs (public/skills, public/anti-patterns, public/tutorials, public/visual-mode)
LOOP outDirs: if dir exists → fs.rmSync(dir, recursive); fs.mkdirSync(dir, recursive)
COMPUTE totalSkills = sum of all category list lengths via Object.values(skillsByCategory).reduce()
CONDITION: if list.length === 0 → continue (skip empty category)
APPEND categoriesHtml with <section data-category> containing: title (CATEGORY_LABELS), count badge, description (CATEGORY_DESCRIPTIONS), skillChips div
RETURN full HTML: header (eyebrow=totalSkills, h1, lede with /impeccable + /critique links) + howto section + categories div
CALL wrapInDocsLayout(sidebarHtml, mainHtml) → bodyHtml (<div class='skills-layout'> wrapping sidebar + main)
CALL renderPage({ title: 'Skills | Impeccable', description, bodyHtml, activeNav: 'docs', canonicalPath: '/skills', bodyClass: 'sub-page skills-layout-page' }) → html

renderSkillsOverviewMain_detail.inputs: skillsByCategory — object keyed by category slug, values are arrays of skill objects with { id, description, category }
renderSkillsOverviewMain_detail.step1: Compute totalSkills via reduce over Object.values(skillsByCategory)
renderSkillsOverviewMain_detail.step2: Iterate CATEGORY_ORDER (imported constant array of canonical category slugs)
step3_per_category: Map skills to chip anchor tags using escapeHtml(s.id), href=/skills/{id}
Build <section class='skills-overview-category'> with: h2 from CATEGORY_LABELS[category], count para, desc para from CATEGORY_DESCRIPTIONS[category], chips div
renderSkillsOverviewMain_detail.step4: Return template literal wrapping: .skills-overview-header (eyebrow, h1 'Skills', lede), .skills-overview-howto (h2, guidance para with inline skill links), .skills-overview-categories (categoriesHtml)

data_dependencies: CATEGORY_ORDER: imported from ./lib/sub-pages-data.js — controls iteration order of categories
CATEGORY_LABELS: imported — human-readable label per category key
CATEGORY_DESCRIPTIONS: imported — paragraph description per category key
buildSubPageData(rootDir): async, returns skillsByCategory, tutorials, rules, knownSkillIds
escapeHtml(str): local helper — sanitises strings for HTML output

output.html_structure: Full page via renderPage() shell → body contains .skills-layout div → .skills-sidebar (from renderDocsSidebar) + .skills-main (from renderSkillsOverviewMain)
inner_sections: .skills-overview-categories — one .skills-overview-category section per non-empty CATEGORY_ORDER entry

conditions_and_branches: Empty category guard: if (list.length === 0) continue — category section omitted entirely
Chip link generation is always 1:1 per skill, no conditional branching
Output dir recreation: if dir exists → delete and recreate (always runs)
key_relationships: generateSubPages orchestrates all sub-page builds; skills-index is first block
renderSkillsOverviewMain depends_on CATEGORY_ORDER, CATEGORY_LABELS, CATEGORY_DESCRIPTIONS (static imports)
generateSubPages depends_on renderPage (HTML shell wrapper from ./lib/render-page.js)
important_notes: renderSkillsOverviewMain is a pure HTML-string builder — no side effects; all I/O is in generateSubPages. The skills index page shares the docs-browser shell (sidebar + main column layout) with skill detail pages and tutorial pages. The sidebar is rendered with current=null for the overview (no active item highlighted). Output dir is always wiped and recreated fresh on each build run.
